Recipe blueprint
================

Overview
--------

The `recipes` blueprint provides endpoints to list recipes, add new recipes (with multipart images), and fetch images (main and step images).

GET /get-recipes
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

Description
~~~~~~~~~~~
Return a JSON list of recipes.

Success Response

.. code-block:: json

   {
     "recipes": [ { "recipe_id": 1, "recipe_title": "Pasta", ... }, ... ]
   }

POST /add-recipe
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

Description
~~~~~~~~~~~
Create a new recipe. This endpoint accepts a multipart/form-data POST with fields and optional files.

Form fields

- recipe-title (string) - required
- recipe-time (string, ISO8601 duration like PT1H30M) - required
- recipe-difficulty (string: easy|medium|hard) - required
- recipe-ingredients (JSON array) - required. Each ingredient object must include:
  - ingredient-name (string)
  - ingredient-amount (int)
  - ingredient-unit (string)
  - ingredient-calories (int)
- recipe-steps (JSON array) - required. Each step object must include:
  - step-index (string) e.g. "1" or "1.1" for sub-steps
  - step-description (string)
  - step-duration (string, ISO duration)

Files

- recipe-main-image - optional file (png/jpg/jpeg/webp)
- step-image-<index> - optional file per step, key name must be `step-image-<step-index>` where `<step-index>` matches the `step-index` value sent in steps JSON.

Success Response

Status: 201

JSON:

.. code-block:: json

   { "recipe-id": 42 }

Errors

- 400 for validation failures (missing fields, invalid JSON, file too large). Max file size = 5MB.

Image endpoints
---------------

GET /recipe-image/<recipe_id>
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

Returns the recipe's main image binary with content-type image/jpeg. 404 if not found.

GET /step-image/<step_id>
^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

Returns a step image binary with content-type image/jpeg. 404 if not found.

Client mapping
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

- `frontend/features/add_recipe/services/recipe_service.dart` uploads multipart fields and files to `/add-recipe`.
- `frontend/features/recipe/home_page.dart` and `search_page.dart` request `/get-recipes` and then use `/recipe-image/<id>` to fetch images.
